name: Evil One (Heat Level 10) 150ml
description: Evil One Ingredients ; Red Peppers, Cider Vinegar, Scotch Bonnet Chili (15%), Onion, Orange pulp, Lemon pulp and zest, Naga Ghost Pepper (3%), Carrot, Garlic, Brown sugar, Chili Extract (1%), Sea Salt. Packed with Scotch Bonnets, Naga Ghost Peppers and a hint of pure chili capsaicin for that super hot long lasting after burn feeling but without the bitter taste capsaicin often gives. This is a super hot, delicious sauce with hints of citrus, a very cleverly well made hot sauce. Great in spaghetti, on a burger, wok, pizza or mix it with some salsa for a great spicy dip. Heat Level 10 Suitable for Vegans

name: Evil Twin - (Heat Level 10) 150ml
description: Evil Twin (no added sugar) Ingredients ; Green Peppers, Vinegar, Scotch Bonnet Chili, Onion, Apple, Lime, Naga Ghost Pepper, Carrot, Spices, Garlic, Chili Extract (1%), Salt. Super Hot sauce with Scotch Bonnet Peppers, Naga Ghost Peppers and 1% Chili extract. Has a great heat, beautiful and fresh with the lime addition. A very well balanced sauce that delivers a great lasting heat from that splash of pure capsaicin. Great for spicy Spaghetti. Add to mayo for a spicy dip sauce. Good in the Wok or on a Burger / Veggie Burger. Heat level 10 Suitable for Vegans

name: Coffee & Ghost Pepper Seasoning Rub BACK IN STOCK  (Heat Level 8)
Happy Hatter Hot Sauce - ORIGINAL  (Heat Level 6)
description: Happy Hatter Hot Sauce – ORIGINAL As featured on popular TV cooking program “Dagelijkse Kost” (“daily dish”) Used personally by celebrity TV chef Jeroen Meus. Ingredients ; Tomato, Peach, Red Onion, Chili peppers (Madame Jeanette 75%, Birds eye 25%) G arlic, Apple, Vinegar, Cane Sugar, Lime, Salt, Celery, Herbs. Proud to stock our first ever Belgian produced hot sauce, by creator Wim Daans. This is a great example of how a hot sauce should be made and we are happy to welcome The Happy Hatter on board! A tomato based sauce, with a hint of peachy sweetness and just the right amount of Madame Jeanette peppers for that fruity, spicy kick. It is very well balanced and warms your mouth nicely without setting it on fire. Perfect for spaghetti sauce, delicious on a burger / veggie burger or a pizza. Add into tomato salsa or mayo to kick start your dip sauces. Great in the wok, with noodles / rice or add a splash into your smoothie mix. A great little boost to start the day! Heat level 6 Suitable for Vegans

name: Trinidad Scorpion - AS FEATURED ON "HOT ONES" (Heat Level 10) 140ml
description: Trinidad Scorpion Ingredients; Cider Vinegar, Sugar, Trinidad Scorpion Pepper, Red Peppers, Salt With a sting in its tail, this super hot Trinidad Scorpion Sauce is a true experience to behold. Juicy and sweet to begin, building heat and a great long lasting burn. Not one for the faint hearted. Vibrant red in colour, this Scorpion has a bite! Delicious in Spaghetti, great with fried Chicken, noodles, rice or any Asian dishes. As Featured On Hot Ones Hot Ones – the famous YouTube show where celebrities eat wings with different heat levels of hot sauces on, while answering awkward questions about their lives! Our Trinidad Scorpion was Sauce Number 7 on the line up of Season 9, rating in at a whopping 104,000 Scoville Heat Units. Officially tested by the show themselves! It took every celebrity by surprise – you can find all the clips on You Tube! Celebrities who have tasted our sauce include; Halle Berry, Idris Elba, Stone Cold Steve Austin, Trevor Noah, Kristen Bell and The Jonas Brothers Heat level 10 Suitable for Vegans

name: "Regret" SUPER EXTREME Hot Sauce (Heat Level 20)
Happy Hatter Hot Sauce - SMOKED (Heat Level 6)
description: Happy Hatter Hot Sauce – SMOKED Ingredients; Forest Fruits, Red Port Wine, Red Wine Vinegar, Dates, Blossom Honey , Ghost Peppers, Red Onion, Shallots, Garlic, Chipotle Powder, Smoked Paprika, Olive Oil, Salt. (Red wine vinegar contains sulphites) This is the second creation from our new Belgian producer and we are very excited to have it in our range. This time he’s gone for a rich smokey hot sauce and we are glad he did. It is sweet, smokey and delicious! His first sauce was a huge success – I’m sure you can’t wait to try this one. Packed with Ghost Peppers, Mexican smoked Chipotle and juicy Forest Fruits. Decadent, full bodied, silky and smooth with a great long lasting spicy finish. This is a truly delicious sauce, perfectly balanced ingredients quickly make this one addictive. Try with Venison, Steak, Pulled Pork, Chili con Carne, BBQ, Burger / Veggie Burger, Mexican food Heat Level 7 NOT suitable for Vegans (contains Honey)

categorySubquery: (SELECT id FROM public.categories WHERE slug = 'dried-chilies-pods-flakes-powders' LIMIT 1)
name: Mexican Habanero Chili Flakes 20g (100,000 -350,000 Scoville Heat Units)
description: Habanero Chili Flakes 100,000 – 350,000 Scoville Heat Units Looking for a chili pepper that has the right balance of heat and flavour? The Habanero is a perfect choice. These peppers are one of the most popular in the world, mostly known for their fruity taste while also having a great balance of heat. Sprinkle into any dish to give your meal a delicious spicy kick. Fresh red habanero peppers are grown in Mexico, cleaned, oven-dried and crushed into these beautiful dark red pepper flakes. Suitable for Vegans

categorySubquery: (SELECT id FROM public.categories WHERE slug = 'dried-chilies-pods-flakes-powders' LIMIT 1)
name: Mexican Habanero Dried Pods (100,000 - 350,000 Scoville Heat Units)

categorySubquery: (SELECT id FROM public.categories WHERE slug = 'dried-chilies-pods-flakes-powders' LIMIT 1)
name: Naga / Ghost Pepper Dried Pods (855,000 - 1 Million Scoville Heat Units)
description: Naga / Ghost Pepper Pods 855,000 – 1 Million Scoville Heat Units The 3rd hottest pepper in the world A bag of 12 dried Ghost Peppers The Naga / Ghost Pepper goes by a few different names. It’s original Indian name is Bhut Jolokia. It originated in Nagaland, North East India and is often referred to as the Naga pepper because of this, but people generally know it as the Ghost Pepper. Sitting at the hottest in the world for a long time this pepper really packs a punch. It has a great flavour. At first it can taste smokey, almost sweet. But wait 30 seconds, the heat creeps up on you, just like a ghost! Fresh peppers are not always easy to come by, so using dried Naga / Ghost Peppers can be a quick and easy replacement to give you a super Hot chili heat. You can just slice them up as they are, crush them into a powder or you can re-hydrate them by soaking them in a bowl of hot water for 10 - 15 minutes until they soften. Suitable for Vegans

description: Habanero Powder 100,000 – 350,000 Scoville Heat Units Looking for a chili pepper that has the right balance of heat and flavour? The Mexican Habanero is the perfect choice. These peppers are one of the most popular in the world, mostly known for their fruity taste while also having a great balance of heat. The powder comes from whole dried Habanero pods which are ground down to make this very fine, delicate powder. Sprinkle into any sauce to give a spicy kick. Ideal for Mexican dishes. Perfect for the BBQ - marinade in oil with meats, fish or veggies. Mix into mayo, yogurt or ketchup to make a spicy dip sauce. Suitable for Vegans

name: 33% Pure Carolina Reaper Sambal - BACK IN APRIL (Heat Level 15)
description: 33% Pure Carolina Reaper Sambal Ingredients; Onions 40%, Carolina Reaper 33%, Refined Sugar 8%, Sunflower Oil 7.5%, Sweet Soy Sauce 7.5%, White Vinegar 0.5%, Salt, Spices The Famous Devon Chilli Man is a UK based Chili Pepper Grower and Hot Sauce Producer. His Pepper plantations in Devon produce some of the hottest AND the best in the business! The Carolina Reaper seeds Cliff uses to grow his giant Reapers have come directly from Ed Currie at The Puckerbutt Pepper Company, South Carolina, USA. (The crazy man responsible for breeding the Carolina Reaper) First, a delicious sweet taste thanks to the caramelised onions. Then it’s a rollercoaster of a ride from the fresh Carolina Reapers. A lot of time, love and attention goes into the production of this Sambal. You won’t be disappointed Heat Level 12 Suitable for Vegans

description: Happy Hatter Hot Sauce – BOMBAY Ingredients; Mango, Pineapple, Yellow Habanero Chili, Onion, White Wine Vinegar, Cane Sugar, Bananas, Garlic, Lime juice, Olive Oil, Spice mix (contains Celery), Salt The 3rd and final addition to the beautiful Happy Hatter family. Fresh juicy, fruity flavours, this sauce has a great taste that leaves you wanting more. Ideal for the wok, noodle or rice dishes. It’s original Indian name is Bhut Jolokia. It originated in Nagaland, North East India and is often referred to as the Naga pepper because of this, but people generally know it as the Ghost Pepper. Sitting at the hottest in the world for a long time this pepper really packs a punch. It has a great flavour. At first it tastes almost smokey, almost sweet. A Green sauce - light, fresh and zesty. So easy to use and accessible for the whole family. Using the unique Shakira Pepper; The Shakira is originally an Arabic chili and mostly used in the Turkish and North African cuisine. The chillies are a long, slightly curved in shape, robust and green in colour. Juicy and slightly bitter, they become sweet and spicy when cooked. This is a well balanced, delicious, very fresh sauce - think Salsa Verde, great on nacho

categorySubquery: (SELECT id FROM public.categories WHERE slug = 'chili-extracts' LIMIT 1)
name: OBLIVION - 500,000 Scoville PURE Capsaicin (Heat Level 12) 30ml
description: Pure Chilli Extract at 500,000 SHU (Scoville Heat Units) 1 million Scoville’s is the most the tongue can detect – welcome to Oblivion... This oleoresin is not bitter or harsh like other extracts due to the African peppers used in its manufacture. Completely clear in colour – this is a very special, unique super hot product. You can use drops of Oblivion for some seriously spicy spaghetti, chili con carne or add 1 drop into vodka shots (a personal favourite) Adds instant long lasting heat to anything it touches.. It is not intended to be ingested directly, but is intended to be used as a food / drink additive. Product of the USA – Bottled in the UK 30 mls DISCLAIMER; The purchaser of Oblivion hereby acknowledges the extreme heat factor of this product and the danger involved if misused. You must be aged 18 or over to buy Oblivion, and should you continue to purchase it, you release Chilisaus.be of all liability and hold us harmless in respect to any claim of damages resulting in the use, consumption, ingestion and/or contact with respect to this product, Grim Reaper’s Oblivion.

name: Johnny Scoville - Tube Of Terror Challenge V1.0 Peanuts - Heat Level, Off The Scale
description: TUBE OF TERROR CHALLENGE Each Tube contains enough peanuts for a 5-6 person party-night challenge or one very brave soul. Grab your crew, a bucket of beer and a Tube of Terror… TIME TO NUT UP OR SHUT UP!! Quite frankly the hottest damn challenge available & the perfect gift for any hot sauce or spicy food lover! Can you handle 30-45 of the world’s hottest peanuts completely smothered with these insanely hot, tongue torching peppers? Carolina Reaper Peppers Trinidad Moruga Scorpion Peppers 7 Pot Brain Strain Peppers 7 Pot Duglah Peppers Bhut Jolokia (Ghost) Peppers All Natural Pure Capsaicin Crystals – 13,000,000 Scoville Listing is for one (1) tube ” If it’s worth doing … It’s worth overdoing” Johnny Scoville DO YOU DARE? Not for the faint of heart, children under the age of 18, elderly people or anyone with any medical condition.

categorySubquery: (SELECT id FROM public.categories WHERE slug = 'chili-challenges-spicy-snacks' LIMIT 1)
name: Blazing Foods - Death Nut Challenge 3.0 (Heat Level - OFF THE SCALE)
description: The All-New Death Nut Challenge - Version 3.0 INGREDIENTS : JUMBO XL VIRGINIA PEANUTS, PURE CANE SUGAR, CAROLINA REAPER PEPPERS, 7-POT PRIMO PEPPERS, PEPPERS (DATIL, SCOTCH BONNET, GHOST (BHUT JOLOKIA), 7-POT BRAIN STRAIN, 7-POT DOUGLAH, TRINIDAD MORUGA SCORPION), 16M PURE ALL NATURAL CAPSAICIN CRYSTALS, SEA SALT, SPICE New peppers, improved flavour variations, triple the peanuts and a brand new Level 5 Death Nut - the Death Nut is made with a new super-hot pepper distillate that is spray-dried into a powder form delivering a whopping 16,000,000 Scoville Heat Units. Each level starts with a base peanut made using Carolina Reaper to establish consistent flavour and heat. Then 5 additional steps to make each level unique and progressively hotter with a load of the world’s hottest peppers, small-batch produced and handcrafted to ensure consistency and quality. Level 1 – Datil Peppers & Scotch Bonnet Level 2 – Ghost Peppers & 7-Pot Brain Strain Level 3 – Double shot of Ghost Peppers & 7-Pot Douglah Level 4 – Double shot of Carolina Reaper, a double shot of 7-Pot Brain Strain & Trinidad Moruga Scorpion Level 5 – Triple shot of Carolina Reaper, a double shot of Trinidad Moruga Scorpion, the explosive 7-Pot Primo Pepper, and our all-new 16 million Scoville Capsaicin Crystals Each challenge is enough for 1-3 brave / crazy players... Heat Level - OFF THE SCALE

categorySubquery: (SELECT id FROM public.categories WHERE slug = 'dried-chilies-pods-flakes-powders' LIMIT 1)
name: Scotch Bonnet Pods 20g (100,000–350,000 Scoville Heat Units)
description: The Scotch Bonnet Pepper is originally a cultivar of the Habanero family – often used in the Caribbean kitchen – where it originated and is widely grown. The flavour is fruity and bright, with a bit of sweetness. Jerk Chicken is a typical dish made with Scotch Bonnet’s. West African dishes are typical for using them also. Named for its supposed resemblance to the shape of a Scottish “Tam O’Shanter” bonnet / hat. Fresh Peppers are not always easy to come by, so using dried Scotch Bonnet Peppers can be a quick and easy replacement to add into your dishes. You can just slice them up as they are, crush them into a powder or re-hydrate them by soaking in a bowl of hot water for 10 – 15 minutes until they soften. Suitable for Vegans Scotch Bonnet Flakes - 30g (100,000–350,000 Scoville Heat Units) qua

categorySubquery: (SELECT id FROM public.categories WHERE slug = 'chili-challenges-spicy-snacks' LIMIT 1)
name: Hot Chip Challenge V2 / 16+
description: HOT-CHIP Challenge is the Hottest Chip in the World It’s a one-of-a-kind experience that most people will never forget... This is not your average packet of crisps to snack on in front of the TV.. Each chip is handmade separately to guarantee consistent quality and spiciness. This product is packaged in a specially designed coffin-shaped box. Inside the package, you will find one extremely hot chip, specially wrapped to keep the highest spiciness and quality locked in. The package also includes a protective glove, tattoo, sticker and certificate. This product has been on the market for several years, but was temporarily banned by the authorities in 2023, even though it did meet the recommended spiciness (the amount of natural capsaicin in the peppers). However - It is now back, in an improved purple version that complies with the new capsaicin levels considered health-safe by the National Institutes of Health. Suitable for Vegans. Gluten-free. Weight: 2,5 g. Manufacturer: HOT-CHIP s.r.o., 28. října 3346/91, Ostrava, 702 00, Czech Republic. Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight 🌶️ SHU 2 200 000

name: Spicy Caramel Popcorn - (Medium Heat) 120g
description: Discover the unique combination of sweet Caramel Popcorn with Habanero Chili Ingredients; Caramel (62%) [sugar, glucose syrup, palm oil, butter ( MILK ) emulsifier (rapeseed lecithin), salt], Popped maize (38%), Habanero Chilli powder (Capsicum chinense) (0.5%) From the creators of the Hot Chip Challenge - this is one super delicious sweet and spicy snack. Almost addictive, but the heat builds.. "The simplicity of our recipe guarantees a delicious taste. Contains only a few carefully selected ingredients that guarantee great taste and quality. The sweet caramel melts gently on your tongue, while the spiciness of the Habanero Chilli warms you up nicely. Popcorn is air popped without the use of oil. This snack is not only tasty but also addictive" May also contain Sesame, Peanuts and Nuts NOT Suitable for Vegans

name: Hot Headz - Trinidad Scorpion Hot Sauce (Heat Level 10) 148ml
description: Ingredients; Trinidad Scorpion Chili (57%), water, natural acetic acid, xanthan gum, salt, ascorbic acid Hot Headz from the UK produce some great products! With their kitchens in Costa Rica, this sauces gives power and heat Explosion of flavours - sweet, fruity, salty - it fills your whole mouth and coats your tongue – then the Scorpion Pepper comes in .. aaand it keeps on going.. This Caribbean delight is tasty and Super Hot! Great with noodles, fried chicken, rice, pizza or a burger Suitable for Vegans

name: Black Death - Carolina Reaper + Black Garlic BACK IN APRIL (Heat Level 15) 100ml
description: Natural SuperHot Sauce (no capsaicin extract used) Ingredients; Balsamic Vinegar (Wine Vinegar ( SULPHITES ), Concentrated Grape Must ( SULPHITES ), Colour (Caramel), Molasses, Black Garlic (8.5%), Carolina Reaper (5.5%), Tomato Powder, Water, Onion, Salt, Black Pepper The star of the this deliciously deadly sauce is the home fermented juicy Black Garlic. Produced and created in the Welsh Valleys of the UK. After a 14 day fermentation process, the garlic changes into a sweet, almost syrup like texture, with flavour hints of balsamic and soy sauce. This sauce will first tickle your taste buds with it

name: Smoky Pepper Seasoning (Heat Level 6) 65g
description: Smoky Pepper Seasoning with Chipotle and Garlic *Now in handy air tight, zip lock packaging Ingredients; Salt, Black Pepper, Garlic, White Peppercorns, Chipotle flakes, Lemon peel, Rosemary, Basic, Citric acid, Thyme, Lemon Verbena, Crushed dried Chillies This is a real secret ingredient in the kitchen. Peppery, garlicky, smokey with a lemon freshness - a sprinkle lifts any meal Use as a bbq marinade with some olive oil, great for a steak. Add into tomato pasta dishes, sprinkle on potatoes or vegetables, pizza, roasted cheese, salads Suitable for Vegans
